name: Kiambu
description: Kiambu County is known for its cool climate and proximity to Nairobi, making it a prime residential area.

towns.name: Ruiru
towns.description: Ruiru is a fast-growing industrial and residential hub located along the Thika Superhighway.

towns.name: Thika
towns.description: Thika is an industrial town and a major commercial center in Kiambu County.

name: Kajiado
description: Kajiado County offers vast land layouts and major development projects like the SGR.

towns.name: Kitengela
towns.description: Kitengela is a cosmopolitan town favored for its affordable land and development potential.

towns.name: Ngong
towns.description: Ngong is famous for the Ngong Hills and its scenic residential properties.

name: Nakuru
description: Nakuru is the agricultural and tourism heart of the Rift Valley.

towns.name: Naivasha
towns.description: Naivasha is a major tourist destination with booming real estate in the lake vicinity.
